metadata.name: the sewers (random texture edit)
metadata.author: martin + Se7enSlasher
metadata.source: martin + Se7enSlasher - the sewers (random texture edit).milk

perFrameCode: qdev = 0; i =0; loop (num_res, qdev += pow(megabuf(i+3)-qavg,2); i += 8; );
n = 2000; m = 4000+step; k=0; slope = 0.01; speed = 0.4/slope; size = 0;
m = m + step; n = n+8; k= k+1;
trelx += BPM/120/q20*run*dt* (1-0.5*slow) * r3 + ndir*movarg*run; //ungef. Bew. Korr
//if (s2<1,q27 = trel1*s3,0); //besser aber nur bei grossem divisor und kleinem narrow
perFrameInitCode: slow = 1; r1=1; r2=1; run = 0; bvol_=1; dir = 1; tlen=2; ndir = 1; size_=1; vol_=1;
